1.title: Twitch Recap 2024
1.description: The Official Chat Badge of the Year. It takes hard work and KomodoHype to receive it. You should be proud to tell everyone you know about this.

1.title: Purple Pixel Heart - Together For Good '24
1.description: This badge was earned by donating $5 or more as part of Twitch Together for Good 2024!

1.title: Gone Bananas Badge
1.description: This gilded banana badge was scored by sharing a lulz-worthy clip during April Fool’s week 2025.

message.body: TTBB is now live! Streaming I Wanna Be the Guy: Uncharted Territory Ahead!
this save gets a yikes from me
cant believe they just left the ledge there
are you sure you're not meant to do it from the ledge and save your jump?
it's funny that they used a spike instead of a block above the corner so you can't do a hold left strat
and by funny i mean rude but also funny
actually it occurs to me if you could save your jump from the ledge through the corner you could basically skip the entire save
step 1. ledge step 2. single jump through corner step 3: double jump right through side gate
or land in the other side to avoid a rawdog sidegate fullspeed
but y'know, master of your own fate and such
what do you mean impossible it's a 2 frame window, that's practically free >>;
you eat 2 frame windows all the time in your avoidances
not all 2 frame windows are created equal
this is just an egregious save because both methods for doing it are ass
even that single jump turnaround is like close to a required 16f or something
not even a full diamond in the lot
yeah the diagonal corner is choke city tho
you fullspeed the first corner you can fullspeed the second
technically any corner is possible at fullspeed w/ correct valign but that's a can of worms
sort of like how you could theoretically do infinite 32px diagonals in a drop: you CAN, but no one should
okay yeah that changes the whole save lmao
its never a choke if its a diagnol
call my penis a diagonal because it made your GF choke
she stutter on my diagnol til i press 'r' to try again
so do you think theres any traps on this screen. that save jump looking mighty bearable
iuno its got 2.5x as many diagnols and a super f
super f is most based f
damn he got the stutter tho
i played avoidance out the womb
the trap will spring aaany second now
i might be wrong but i think you can bhop that super f for an extra frame of leniency
well you just do a 5f before hand
since you're aiming for a 5f anyway
but yeah fair i suck at bhopping them too
my thought process is that if i fail teh bhop i still get to try the 5f after anyway so why not go for it
fail it oneway and you just get a normal jump. fail it the other way and you get no double
shoulda had you do a raised triple diamond too
you should practice gates so you dont choke the end
how come you never play avoidance
avoidance tends to be behind non avoidance
do modern adventure games even have mikus anymore
did they ever make yep game compilation
modern people realized mikus suck ass
Lol GL with peak level design
nah but if u made a game with like 100 5 second rng avoidances itd be fire
i opened game called i wanna prima...
go further into the first dip?
can you just jump jump whats the hold up
gamble another anime for every 10 minutes here
then drop it and watch real tv
you keep making it sound better
im pretty sure you have cancel the first jump
unless the engine is very different
if you want it to matter more watch Kamisama Kiss
think you just gotta dip deep
if im in a boxing match I want doc louis in my corner not some nerd
ive beat hard enough needle with jump jump
idk cant find cancelless strat syadouSweat
great we need proof for every clear now
need to repress the shift i think
crazy how you need to be a software engineer to play needle
yea wheres the proof of testplay
just did the consistency test of this save
dont need proof when i have aura
they should've put demo block in that 1 block gap
get far left wall align idk
click jump and numpad at the same time always gets the job done
you tap them both lightly idk its how i did secret 2 save 3
yea but i had to cheese a cancel
my bad im going to bed LOOOL
im trying to find a setup where you can bonk on the block
because the alternative is doing a short cancel
i guess in that case are you good at short canceling
get there with a short cancel then 3 frame
i tried deleting the extra stuff
classic discord destroying permanent image links
hold right the entire time, but cancel into that position
it would still be 'permanent' but only if you paste it into discord
stand about here for the cancel
can't be a full cancel, has to be a short cancel
and you can hold right the entire time
i use the term short cancel to mean a cancel where you don't hold shift, causing you to do a jump less than a 1 frame
how consistent is cancelling? cause you cvan just 1f the second jump
ugh i hate hearing about cancel culture
bro like a couple years ago i talked to you about getting into these games, that lasted like an hour i couldnt hack it lmao
i feel like polling rate is super important
theres gotta be a way u can just remap r
have u seen those osu clickers
alright in the time youve been on this ive managed to start and clear a pattern avoidance, whats the deal
again pattern avoidance im pretty sure I got fucked more
looks like ill have time for another paraSad
yes if you jump close to the edge
lock in lock in lock in lock in lock in lock in lock in lock in lock in
I dont even think you need a cancel
bro just jump through the spikes
then just cancel its not hard
why is there more than one cancel
you're either cancelled or not cancelled
statements made up by the mentally insane
I hope needle players remember to visit their family members every so often
just post your save in #needle and use your call a friend lifeline
I could do it anyways so just do it
i beat figure this is nothing
yeah it has actually playable content
I also beat seven trials so I know sewage too
alright what if instead of canceling you jump up next to the first top spike. then fall thru the gate. what about then
okay bed time may you not die to the gate jump
thats not a diagonal so yeah probably will
the only good jumps are http://fangam.es/advancedjumps
what did you learn from that
that was the worst attempt ever
we learned its a real jump
im pretty sure that was just a throw for content
ugh i dont wanna hear this shit again COME ON >>:(OGO(CVXBKXC" BV">VCn.dfgxb
is it required? Don't you do just treat it like an normal double diamond?
Egg_zauce is wasted right now please be patient
I'm literally not even tipsy dude, I'm just stupid
this is how i act all the itme
No! This time is different! I can tell!
I'm driving with a margarita in one hand and my phone in the other
sorry not my phopne, i mean my computer
alright naptime. goodluck winning on your 4th doublediamond clear
You might not like the news i have
Do you think the maker beat this
this is hella possible without cancel
This was 2017 apparently so maybe the maker had the technology...
Basically it's renex engine jtool with some of the engine's gimmicks
play one needle game for every failed attempt
have you gotten past the double diamond
so what you're saying is you need practice
Wtf I've been hating on 254 forever and no one gave me shit
thoughts on creepers from parallel world?
Maybe your drinks will combine and become a jar of peanuts
Too high, too low, when will it end...
need to play the 100k diamonds game
This shit lookin like a roulette roll
